3:
As you have inherited her grandfather's Soul of the Astrologian, Leveva has been assigned to oversee your training. By way of a first lesson, you are to practice alone while she finds a suitable location for your <Emphasis>next</Emphasis> lesson.

※The next astrologian quest will be available from Jannequinard upon reaching level 35.
